name: Strategy Agent
description: 7-dimension scoring model — ranks product ideas by market opportunity

name: Planner Agent
description: Generates 7 planning documents (PRD, TECH_SPEC, UI_PLAN, TASKS, ROADMAP, CHECKLIST, DECISIONS)

name: Bootstrap Agent
description: Scaffolds full Next.js 14 project with Tailwind, TypeScript, fonts, config

name: Developer Agent
description: Reads TASKS.md and executes implementation tasks

name: QA Agent
description: Runs 15 Playwright checks per project — build, serve, test, report

name: Deploy Agent
description: GitHub push + Vercel deploy + HTTP 200 verification + triggers Growth Agent

name: Growth Agent
description: SEO audit, social media drafts, launch plans, KPI dashboards per product
